title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 25 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 25 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 25 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 25/05/2023
DCE iron ore futures fall today by 2.23%. the main contract I2309 closed 681. Traders have strong willingnessto support prices; Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high.
